name: NULL Pointer Dereference
description: The product dereferences a pointer that it expects to be valid but is actually NULL, typically causing a crash or exit that results in denial of service, or in rare privileged contexts enabling unauthorized memory access.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM or EXTERNAL node returns a potentially-null value that flows to another TRANSFORM node performing a dereference (member access, method call, array index) without passing through a CONTROL[null_check] node that validates the value is non-null
